key_insights.insight: Defining what you are a 'slave' to is crucial for directing your actions and purpose.
key_insights.quote: It's so important for you to have front and centre in your mind what you're a slave to.

key_insights.insight: Music can be used to actively mood set at the beginning of your day, instead of passively amplifying negative feelings.
key_insights.quote: Don't let your brain pick the music. Your brain will default to amplify your existing emotions. Preset the music in your playlist and get up in the morning and go straight to it even if you're not feeling like it.

key_insights.insight: Perfectionism can paradoxically hinder progress by causing over-focus on minor details and preventing delegation.
key_insights.quote: Perfectionism is holding me back. And the weird thing is, I think perfectionism is also what's got me here.

key_insights.insight: Learning to say 'no' to tempting opportunities is essential for long-term success.
key_insights.quote: Never drop the pie reaching for an apple.

key_insights.insight: Unlearning toxic beliefs and habits is as crucial as acquiring new knowledge.
key_insights.quote: If you do not unlearn them immediately, they will hold you back more than lessons you can learn will take you forward.

key_insights.insight: Karma isn't supernatural; it's the logical outcome of planting seeds of kindness or negativity in interactions.
key_insights.quote: Karma is a very real logical thing. Every single day, all of us are planting seeds.

key_insights.insight: Believing in your ability to achieve something is often more important than innate talent or resources.
key_insights.quote: The only reason you can't do something is when you start to believe you can't right that is the biggest danger to your ability to achieve it the belief that you can't.

key_insights.insight: Your fears define your life's path; choose what you fear wisely.
key_insights.quote: You're defined by what you're scared of...Your life is the manifestation of your fear.

actionable_advice.how_to: Compile a playlist of songs that make you feel pumped up, happy, and motivated. Listen to it every morning while getting ready, regardless of your initial mood.

actionable_advice.advice: Make a list of things you need to 'unlearn'.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify toxic thoughts, childhood heartbreaks, and bad habits that are holding you back. Actively work on changing these ingrained patterns.

actionable_advice.advice: Identify what you are a slave to.
actionable_advice.how_to: Write down the things you prioritize and dedicate your time to. Analyze whether these are aligned with your long-term goals and happiness.

memorable_stories: The story of Stephen Bartlett encountering John, a man who helped him early in his career, years later when he was asked for a job reference.
The story of Stephen Bartlett sitting on a university panel for a student who ended up working at YouTube when Bartlett was pitching to them
contrarian_claims: The idea that being a 'slave' to something, specifically your own eulogy, can be a positive motivator.
The claim that perfectionism, often seen as a virtue, can actually hold you back.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - E23: I am a Slave, My Fear and Therapy
